taxonomy: Camaridium cassapense is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae and is native to Venezuela. Camaridium cassapense is also known by its synonym, Lepanthes cassapense. The classification of Camaridium cassapense places it within the subfamily Epidendroideae. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and phylogenetic relationships within the orchid family.

The traditional use of Camaridium cassapense as a medicinal plant should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional.
